hero.title: Smart EV Charging for
hero.subtitle: Integrate EV chargers, monitor in real-time and increase guest satisfaction with a unified and intuitive platform.

features.title: Everything you need in
features.subtitle: Powerful tools to manage your EV charging infrastructure with efficiency and precision.

ocpp.title: OCPP Integration
ocpp.description: Compatible with all OCPP 1.6 and 2.0.1 chargers. Plug & play with simple configuration.

realtime.title: Real-time Monitoring
realtime.description: Track the status of each charger, active sessions and energy consumption live.

multisite.title: Multi-site Management
multisite.description: Manage your entire charging network from a single centralized interface.

reports.title: Reports & Analytics
reports.description: Detailed insights on usage, revenue and energy efficiency with data export.

payments.title: Integrated Payments
payments.description: Monetize your network with multiple payment options and flexible pricing models.

support.title: 24/7 Support
support.description: Expert team available at any time to resolve issues quickly.

howItWorks.title: Set up in
howItWorks.subtitle: A simple, guided process to get your charging network up and running.

connect.title: Connect your chargers
connect.description: Integrate your existing chargers via OCPP. Compatible with all major brands on the market.

configure.title: Configure your network
configure.description: Set groups, rates, schedules and access permissions in a visual and intuitive way.

monitor.title: Monitor in real-time
monitor.description: Track all sessions, status and metrics from the centralized dashboard.

optimize.title: Optimize and maximize
optimize.description: Use reports and analytics to optimize usage and continuously increase your revenue.

benefits.title: Why hotels choose
benefits.subtitle: Transform your hotel into the preferred destination for electric vehicle drivers.

guests.title: Attract Premium Guests
guests.description: EV travelers have 40% higher income and choose hotels with charging infrastructure.

revenue.title: New Revenue Stream
revenue.description: Monetize your infrastructure with per-kWh, per-session or monthly subscription charging.

esg.title: ESG Compliance
esg.description: Demonstrate sustainability commitment and improve your ESG score with automatic reports.

support.title: Specialized Support
support.description: Dedicated hospitality EV team to ensure the best experience for your guests.

cta.title: Ready to transform
cta.subtitle: Join over 150 hotels that have already chosen VoltWise for their EV charging infrastructure.
cta.note: No credit card required · 14-day free trial · Cancel anytime

footer.tagline: Smart EV charging platform for modern hospitality.
